title: Adobe security advisory (AV26-697)
description: On July 14, 2026, Adobe published security advisories to address critical vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Adobe After Effects - version 25.6.5 and prior
Adobe After Effects - version 26.2.1 and prior
Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) - version AEM Cloud Service (CS) Release 2026.5.0 and prior
Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) - version 6.5 LTS Service Pack 1 and prior
Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) - version 6.5 Service Pack 24 and prior
Adobe Media Encoder - version 25.6.5 and prior
Adobe Media Encoder - version 26.2.2 and prior
Adobe Premiere Pro - version 25.6.5 and prior
Content Credentials Command-Line Tool - version c2patool-v0.17.0 and prior
Content Credentials JS SDK - version @contentauth/c2pa-web@0.7.0 and prior
Content Credentials Rust SDK - version c2pa-v0.84.0 and prior
Creative Cloud Desktop Application - version 6.9.1.1 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
